{{nihongo|'''Hachiman Shrine (Koura, Minamiizu)'''|八幡神社 (南伊豆町子浦)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Hachiman shrine|lt=Hachiman shrine|en|Hachiman shrine|fa|معبد هاچیمان|fr|Sanctuaire Hachiman|it|Santuario di Hachiman|ja|八幡宮|simple|Hachiman shrines|vi|Đền thờ thần Hachiman|zh|八幡宮|qid=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

[[JA:八幡神社 (南伊豆町子浦)]]

== Japanese content ==

|??   = Hachiman Shrine

|??? = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}{{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}} K?ura 1000
|??   = {{coord|34|40|15.6|N|138|47|6.4|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
|??   = Iwakurawake-no-Mikoto

{{coord2|34|40|15.6|N|138|47|6.4|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''Hachiman Shrine''' (????????) is a {{ill|lt=shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in K?ura, {{ill|lt=Minamiizu|Q1203741|qid=Q1203741|1=Minamiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}<ref>[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4401081 Hachiman Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Shrine Office</ref>.

=== Overview ===
It is located in the western part of Minamiizu, northwest of the K?ura district, just south of the former Mihama Elementary School.

Its founding is unknown, but it is a candidate shrine for the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} "Iwakurawake-no-Mikoto Shrine" (??????????????), and an ancient shrine also recorded in the ''{{ill|lt=Izu no kuni jinjaich?|Q17193087|qid=Q17193087|1=Izu no kuni jinjaich?}}'' as "J?shi-i no J? Ihakurawake no My?jin"<ref name="gen">[https://genbu.net/data/izu/hatiman3_title.htm Hachiman Shrine] - Genmatsushi</ref><ref name="engi">[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140128-03.html Hachiman Shrine] - Study of Engishiki Shrines</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* Iwakurawake-no-Mikoto (??????????)

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
